description: Series of eight 6-second bumper ads, each showcasing one product use-case with a humorous punchline. Extremely tight storytelling: problem-product-payoff in 6 seconds flat.
why_included: Brilliant format efficiency. If you can tell a complete story in 6 seconds, you can nail any hook. The constraint forces creative excellence. Can Wiom do 6-second problem-solution bumpers?
